description: Load test-only persistence routines and append prefix-unique parser aliases after every production module

replacements.new:
<INSERT-FILE "ritual_resonance" T>
<INSERT-FILE "persistence_test" T>
<ROUTINE V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY-LIT ()
	<MOVE ,LAMP ,WINNER>
	<FSET ,LAMP ,ONBIT>
	<V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY>
	<SETG CLOCK-WAIT T>
	<RTRUE>>
<SYNTAX PTREADY = V-PERSIST-TROLL-READY-LIT>
<SYNTAX PTREPORT = V-PERSIST-TROLL-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PTMUTATE = V-PERSIST-TROLL-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PEREADY = V-PERSIST-EGG-READY>
<SYNTAX PEREPORT = V-PERSIST-EGG-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PEMUTATE = V-PERSIST-EGG-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PDREADY = V-PERSIST-DAM-READY>
<SYNTAX PDTOP = V-PERSIST-DAM-TOP>
<SYNTAX PDREPORT = V-PERSIST-DAM-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PDMUTATE = V-PERSIST-DAM-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PDTIMER = V-PERSIST-DAM-TIMER>
<SYNTAX PLREADY = V-PERSIST-LEAK-READY>
<SYNTAX PLREPORT = V-PERSIST-LEAK-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PLMUTATE = V-PERSIST-LEAK-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PRREADY = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-READY>
<SYNTAX PRREPORT = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-REPORT>
<SYNTAX PRMUTATE = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-MUTATE>
<SYNTAX PRTIMER = V-PERSIST-RITUAL-TIMER>
